channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Dumped divan base, 6th April
item.description:
A dumped bed base has been left by the tree behind the fish and chip shop on ravenscroft road. this is a regular dumping spot.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 81, Elmers End Road, Anerley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti on Junction box and mobile tower, 6th April
item.description:
Graffiti on Junction box and mobile tower

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Cray Avenue, Poverest, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Somebody has built a make shift walkway across the river, this defeats the work that has been done and is causing a build up of detritus, 6th April
item.description:
Somebody has built a make shift walkway across the river, this defeats the work that has been done and is causing a build up of detritus

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Allotments track, Poverest, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Lots of litter in bushes along Cray avenue needs a good proper clear up, 6th April
item.description:
Lots of litter in bushes along Cray avenue needs a good proper clear up

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Cray Avenue, Poverest, Greater London

item.title: Water gate has been opened... I can see kids ending up going down this as could pose a safety risk, 6th April
item.description:
Water gate has been opened... I can see kids ending up going down this as could pose a safety risk

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 87, Cray Avenue, Poverest, Greater London

item.title: Dead fox on footpath, 6th April
item.description:
Was in the kerb opposite the water tower but has been moved onto pathway It’s been there for a couple of days
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Shooters Hill, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Off junction between St Julian’s rd n Willesden Lane., 6th April
item.description:

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Willesden Lane, Kilburn, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Small - Less than one bag

item.title: Dangerous branches, poorly kept tree, 6th April
item.description:
Over the last 2 months numerous large branches having fallen into our garden from this tree. It has now become so dangerous that we can't allow our two children to play in the garden. It needs to be cut back significantly

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Iron Mill Lane, Crayford, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.description:
